procedural_independence_before_freeze: YES. Before freeze, no prior reports, logs, shortlist tables, frozen candidates, system specifications, benchmark specifications, or serialized outputs from earlier sessions were consulted. All consulted non-raw artifacts before freeze were generated inside the current session from the admissible raw prompt and raw CSV data.
global_cross_session_split_independence: NO. Discovery, candidate-selection holdout, and reserve/internal windows all come from the same historical file. They are procedurally separated within this session, but they are not globally independent across sessions or across files. Reserve/internal remains internal evidence only and is not eligible for CLEAN OOS CONFIRMED.
convergence_statement: Prior session outputs were deliberately not consulted. Therefore no truthful convergence/divergence statement against named prior winners is made.
notes: Prompt text and raw CSVs were the only quantitative inputs before freeze.
All non-raw artifacts consulted before freeze were created inside this session from admissible raw inputs.
Benchmark comparison was not run because no benchmark specifications were supplied after reserve/internal evaluation.
